memory.summary: Friends are inviting me to Echo tonight with no pressure, but I have a midterm tomorrow and am only 60% through my review.
I prioritized studying, raising my midterm prep to 78%, but missed the last chance to go out with friends before Mina leaves.
I am fully rested and ready to tackle my remaining 22% of midterm review, but I still feel guilty about missing the opportunity to see Mina before she leaves.
